summary: Completed Step 0 only for run tag `2026-03-04-independent-rerun4`: created required run directories and seeded `data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4` from `data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent` via rsync. Verified directory existence and source/target snapshot parity (file count, byte total, filename set). No future playbook steps were executed.
commands_run:
export RUN_TAG='2026-03-04-independent-rerun4'
export SNAPSHOT_DIR='data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4'
export EVIDENCE_DIR='results/proofs/evidence_2026-03-04-independent-rerun4'
export TABLES_DIR='results/tables'
export CHARTS_DIR='results/charts'
export PREV_SNAPSHOT_DIR='data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent'
mkdir -p "$SNAPSHOT_DIR" "$EVIDENCE_DIR" "$TABLES_DIR" "$CHARTS_DIR"
rsync -a "$PREV_SNAPSHOT_DIR/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"

echo '--- required directories ---'
for d in \
  'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' \
  'results/proofs/evidence_2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' \
  'results/tables' \
  'results/charts'
do
  if [ -d "$d" ]; then
    echo "OK $d"
  else
    echo "MISSING $d"
  fi
done

echo '--- snapshot file counts ---'
prev_count=$(find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
new_count=$(find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "prev_count=$prev_count"
echo "new_count=$new_count"

echo '--- snapshot byte totals ---'
prev_bytes=$(find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent' -type f -exec wc -c {} + | tail -n 1 | awk '{print $1}')
new_bytes=$(find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' -type f -exec wc -c {} + | tail -n 1 | awk '{print $1}')
echo "prev_bytes=$prev_bytes"
echo "new_bytes=$new_bytes"

echo '--- sample seeded files ---'
find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' -maxdepth 1 -type f | sed "s#^#- #" | head -n 12

tmp_prev=$(mktemp)
tmp_new=$(mktemp)
find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent' -maxdepth 1 -type f -print | sed "s#data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent/##" | sort > "$tmp_prev"
find 'data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4' -maxdepth 1 -type f -print | sed "s#data/snapshots/external_review/2026-03-04-independent-rerun4/##" | sort > "$tmp_new"
echo 'missing_in_new:'
comm -23 "$tmp_prev" "$tmp_new" || true
echo 'extra_in_new:'
comm -13 "$tmp_prev" "$tmp_new" || true
rm -f "$tmp_prev" "$tmp_new"

validation_checks.name: Seed copy parity: file counts
validation_checks.details: `find ... -type f | wc -l` returned prev_count=20 and new_count=20.

validation_checks.name: Seed copy parity: byte totals
validation_checks.details: `wc -c` aggregate totals matched: prev_bytes=6479238 and new_bytes=6479238.

validation_checks.name: Seed copy parity: filename set
validation_checks.details: `comm` comparison reported no `missing_in_new` and no `extra_in_new` files.

validation_checks.name: Evidence directory initialized
validation_checks.details: `results/proofs/evidence_2026-03-04-independent-rerun4` exists and currently contains 0 files, consistent with Step 0 setup.

next_actions: remaining_items: none within assigned Step 0 scope.
out_of_scope_pending: execute Step 1+ (refresh dynamic sources and rebuild downstream artifacts) in subsequent assigned steps only.
